judgment.summary: Marvell Technology shows strong growth and profitability, supported by AI infrastructure demand, though its valuation is high.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 1.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 22.1% YoY and earnings growth 106.3% YoY indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 32.6% and operating margin 18.7% demonstrate healthy profitability.
Free cash flow of $1.44B TTM provides solid operational cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'strong_buy' with 40 analysts covering the stock.
Forward P/E of 35.15x is lower than trailing P/E of 62.66x, suggesting expected earnings growth.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 62.66x and Price/Sales of 20.49x indicate a high valuation.
Total debt of $4.79B exceeds total cash of $2.64B, resulting in net debt.
Beta of 2.25 suggests higher volatility compared to the broader market.
Analyst mean target of $148.18 is below the current spot price of $191.84.

news.paragraph: Evercore ISI recently raised Marvell Technology's price target, citing increasing demand for AI infrastructure. This positive analyst action comes just ahead of the company's next earnings report, which is scheduled for May 27th. Traders should consider the analyst's optimism in the context of the upcoming earnings release and Marvell's significant role in the AI supply chain.

headlines.title: Evercore ISI Raises Marvell Technology (MRVL) Price Target on Rising AI Infrastructure Demand

examples.body: $MRVL Is it possible we are getting some of that free 2 billion being handed out today from the Feds?
